baseline: Within-experiment: prose mode (current production market analyst output) on the same dates. Cross-experiment: WC-10 v1 + v2 + v3 cohorts use prose-mode market analyst (default) — those are the broader baseline reference.
notes: BR-3 v1 scaffold: 5 dates × 2 tickers × 2 formats = 20 propagates × ~$0.40 = ~$8 LLM (T2). Tests whether market analyst's free-form prose carries signal vs structured emitter (sister hypothesis to WC-10 PM-stage finding). Implementation Option A recommended (new tradingagents/agents/analysts/market_analyst_structured.py module + market_analyst_format config key). NOT yet launched; HYPOTHESIS + PARAMS scaffold only — operator authorization required.
